title: Pham Thi Van Anh
subtitle: Digital Marketing Leader & Campaign Strategist

paragraphs: A digital marketing leader with a passion for building brand narratives that connect and convert. With hands-on experience leading campaigns for global brands and high-growth startups, I bridge the gap between creative vision and measurable results. Trained in international communications and marketing strategy, I thrive in environments that demand both analytical rigour and bold storytelling.

design.typography: Large serif or display font for name; clean sans-serif for tagline

summary: Portfolio cover page introducing Pham Thi Van Anh as a digital marketing leader and campaign strategist with a creative, data-driven, results-focused approach.
